content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 87)** — `EmptyState` conformance: `Title` should not be a direct child of `EmptyState`. The title text should be moved to the `titleText` prop on `EmptyState`.

**Fix 2 (Lines 3, 40, 61)** — `RowProps` type changed: new fields `index` and `onSelect?` were added. The component at line 61 destructures `{ obj, activeColumnIDs }` from `RowProps<NodeKind>`. Since `RowProps` now has additional fields (`index`, `onSelect?`), this is a non-breaking additive change for this file — the code only destructures what it needs, so no code change is needed for the actual usage. The type change is in the SDK's type definitions, not in this file.

**Fix 3 (Line 86)** — `EmptyState` has a new `titleText` prop. The `<Title>` child content should be moved to `titleText` prop. This overlaps with Fix 1.

Let me combine Fix 1 and Fix 3: The `<Title>` wrapper inside `<EmptyState>` should be removed, and its content moved to the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`. The `headingLevel` from `<Title>` maps to `headingLevel` on `EmptyState`. The `Title` import should be removed since it won't be used anymore.

arguments.after:
<EmptyState
        headingLevel="h2"
        titleText={
          selectedLabels.length === 0
            ? t("No nodes were selected, use filter to select nodes")
            : t("No nodes match the selected labels")
        }
      />
arguments.before:
<EmptyState>
        <Title headingLevel="h2" size="lg">
          {selectedLabels.length === 0
            ? t("No nodes were selected, use filter to select nodes")
            : t("No nodes match the selected labels")}
        </Title>
      </EmptyState>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:
The file looks correct. Let me verify there are no companion test files to check:

No companion test files found. The file is complete and correct.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — EmptyState conformance (`sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`, line 87)
**Applied.** Removed the `<Title>` child from inside `<EmptyState>` and moved its content to the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`. The `headingLevel="h2"` was also moved from `<Title>` to `<EmptyState>`. The `size="lg"` prop from `<Title>` was dropped as it is not a valid prop on `EmptyState` (v6 EmptyState controls sizing via the `variant` prop). The `Title` import from `@patternfly/react-core` was removed since it is no longer used.

### Fix 2 — `RowProps` type change (lines 3, 40, 61)
**No change needed.** The `RowProps` type gained two new fields (`index: number` and `onSelect?: OnSelect`) in the SDK's type definitions. This file imports and uses `RowProps<NodeKind>` at line 61, destructuring only `{ obj, activeColumnIDs }`. Since the new fields are either optional (`onSelect?`) or simply not destructured by this component, the existing code is forward-compatible with the updated type. No code changes are required in this consumer file.

### Fix 3 — EmptyState `titleText` absorbing prop (line 86)
**Applied (combined with Fix 1).** The `<Title>` child content was moved to the new `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`, which is the v6 pattern for providing title text. The `<EmptyState>` is now a self-closing element with `headingLevel` and `titleText` props.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — EmptyState conformance (`sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap`, line 87)
**Applied.** Removed the `<Title>` child from inside `<EmptyState>` and moved its content to the `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`. The `headingLevel="h2"` was also moved from `<Title>` to `<EmptyState>`. The `size="lg"` prop from `<Title>` was dropped as it is not a valid prop on `EmptyState` (v6 EmptyState controls sizing via the `variant` prop). The `Title` import from `@patternfly/react-core` was removed since it is no longer used.

### Fix 2 — `RowProps` type change (lines 3, 40, 61)
**No change needed.** The `RowProps` type gained two new fields (`index: number` and `onSelect?: OnSelect`) in the SDK's type definitions. This file imports and uses `RowProps<NodeKind>` at line 61, destructuring only `{ obj, activeColumnIDs }`. Since the new fields are either optional (`onSelect?`) or simply not destructured by this component, the existing code is forward-compatible with the updated type. No code changes are required in this consumer file.

### Fix 3 — EmptyState `titleText` absorbing prop (line 86)
**Applied (combined with Fix 1).** The `<Title>` child content was moved to the new `titleText` prop on `<EmptyState>`, which is the v6 pattern for providing title text. The `<EmptyState>` is now a self-closing element with `headingLevel` and `titleText` props.
